stemHtml: Consider an aircraft with hydraulically operated brakes and a pneumatically operated emergency braking system, which uses the normal hydraulic brake lines. The aircraft also has an anti-skid system to avoid loss of control and locked wheels during braking. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The anti-skid system will allow for a lower brake temperature when braking hard.
options.b: After using the backup braking system, the brake pedals will feel softer than normal.
options.c: Normal braking is available after using the emergency braking system, provided it is operational.
options.d: The emergency braking system will be able to stop in a shorter distance, compared to normal braking.
